name: greeting → asks name + language, no property dump
rule: Reply must ask for the lead's name AND offer language preference (English/Hindi/Marathi). Must NOT dump property listings or prices in the first message. Must be warm and welcoming. Should ask name first, not start with area or budget questions.
raw: Hi! Welcome to SK Properties 😊 May I know your good name? And by the way, I can chat in English, हिंदी or मराठी — whichever is comfortable for you!
reply: Hi! Welcome to SK Properties 😊 May I know your good name? And by the way, I can chat in English, हिंदी or मराठी — whichever is comfortable for you!
judgeWhy: PASS - The reply asks for the lead's name first and offers language preference (English, Hindi, Marathi), while being warm and welcoming, without dumping property listings or prices.
